description_long: This is a tall, tapered cylindrical plant pot with a wide, slightly flared rim and a smooth, unadorned surface. The pot is predominantly white and features two small, angular protrusions on opposite sides, which may serve as subtle handles or decorative elements. The body of the pot is seamless and uniform, with a matte finish that gives it a clean, modern appearance. The interior is hollow, designed to hold soil and a plant, and the opening is large enough to accommodate a medium-sized plant. There are no visible decorative patterns or textures, emphasizing its minimalist style. The pot appears lightweight and is likely made from plastic or a similar synthetic material.
description: A tall, white, tapered cylindrical plant pot with a wide rim and two small angular side protrusions, featuring a smooth, matte surface and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide opening, smooth surface, and one prominent angular side protrusion.
description_view_1: Side view reveals both angular protrusions on opposite sides and the pot's symmetrical taper.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the uninterrupted smooth surface and the subtle presence of one side protrusion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other angular protrusion and the pot's consistent cylindrical shape.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used on sidewalks or patios in urban residential areas
